ARGUED. Mr. Akay contests the tentative ruling and argues. Mr. Chase informs the court they hope to go through mediation. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF NATALIE FAWZI's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-23-606318 WITH CASE CGC-24-617866.

Plaintiff Natalie Fawzi's unopposed motion to consolidate Singh v. Skylight Tools, Inc., Case No. CGC-23-606318 ("First Action") and Fawzi v. Singh, Case No. CGC-24-617866 ("Second Action") is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

(see word minutes for full details)
